headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Valuation Check After Volatile Share Price And 1 Year Rally
summary: Ulta Beauty stock performance snapshot Ulta Beauty (ULTA) has caught investor attention after a mixed recent run, with the share price showing a 1 day gain of 1.2% but declines over the past week, month, and past 3 months. Against that choppy backdrop, the stock still shows a 1 year total return of 52.1%, alongside revenue of US$12.39b and net income of US$1.15b, highlighting the scale of the specialty beauty retailer.
